item.title: Extract run_validated_command() helper — validation execution duplicated 3 times
item.intent: Eliminate the 3 copies of timeout-aware validation command execution (pre-flight, main validation, AC verification) by extracting a single run_validated_command() helper function
steps: Find all 3 instances of the timeout/bash -c VALIDATE_CMD pattern (pre-flight, main validation, AC verification)
Extract a run_validated_command() function that takes a label and output file, handles timeout vs gtimeout detection, and runs the command
Replace all 3 call sites with calls to the new helper
Run shellcheck and verify no regressions
acceptanceCriteria: Only one function contains the timeout-aware bash -c VALIDATE_CMD pattern
All 3 original call sites use the new helper
